title: athyrium × kathmanduense
intro: Athyrium × kathmanduense, also known as the Kathmandu lady fern, is a hybrid fern species derived from the cross between the Japanese lady fern (Athyrium yokosuke) and the Himalayan lady fern (Athyrium filix-femina). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Athyrium × kathmanduense include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion to harness its medicinal properties, with the herbal preparations also used in the form of tinctures and infusions to promote overall well-being.
